item.message: Skill descriptions were shortened to fit the 2% skills context budget. Codex can still see every skill, but some descriptions are shorter. Disable unused skills or plugins to leave more room for the rest.

item.text: I’ll inspect the three requested source files, update the account schema/model and summary projection, then run the test suite.

The generated base schema is reused by `schema.mjs`, so I’ll layer the account validator there to preserve the generator while enforcing the new optional enum for both fresh and existing live collections.

The first test exposed that applying the generator’s full validator retroactively imposes its required `createdAt` field on the benchmark’s existing account flow. I’m narrowing the live validator change to the new optional field alone, preserving that flow.

item.aggregated_output:
npm notice run build-bench-mongo-schema-evolution-enterprise@1.0.0 test
npm notice run node tests/acceptance.test.mjs
Build-Bench enterprise acceptance passed: mongo

item.text:
Implemented `preferredPaymentMethod` support across the account schema, account create/update flow, and order summaries.

`npm test` passes: `Build-Bench enterprise acceptance passed: mongo`.
